title: pandanus gramineus
intro: Pandanus gramineus, also known as the screw pine, is a type of tropical plant native to Southeast Asia and the Pacific Islands. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pandanus gramineus include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as improving skin and hair conditions, and supporting immune function. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are used to treat various health issues and promote overall well-being.
